Vintage G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero pack-in driver or pilot listing. YoJoe confirms the individual character page and loose figure gallery. This character was sold with a vehicle in the original line and is kept as a separate catalog entry because aftermarket collectors often acquire the driver independently of the vehicle.
